news.summary: Cogeco Inc. announced its financial results for the second quarter ending February 28, 2025. Revenue remained stable at $753.2 million, with adjusted EBITDA increasing by 2.6% to $356.9 million. Profit for the period was $76.6 million, attributable to owners being $18.2 million. Net capital expenditures decreased by 7.5% to $158.9 million, while free cash flow increased by 12.3% to $112.8 million. The company declared a quarterly dividend of $0.922 per share, representing an 8.0% increase. The three-year transformation program is in progress, with a Canadian wireless launch expected. Customer satisfaction has improved year-over-year in both Canada and the U.S. Financial guidelines for fiscal 2025 remain unchanged. Fiber-to-the-home network expansion projects are ongoing, with approximately 7,000 homes passed in the second quarter. Acquisition of property, plant, and equipment decreased by 11.5% to $160.3 million. Cash flows from operating activities decreased by 12.7% to $250.1 million. The Board of Directors declared a quarterly dividend increase of 8.0%.
news.headline: Cogeco's Q2 fiscal 2025 results show stable revenue of $753.2M, an 8.0% dividend increase to $0.922 per share declared. Management pleased with transformation efforts driving customer satisfaction and cost reductions. Financial guidelines maintained as per expectations.

news.summary: Energy Transfer LP (ET) and MidOcean Energy disclosed a partnership regarding Energy Transfer LNG Export, LLC's Lake Charles LNG project. The agreement, with EIG-managed MidOcean, a LNG company, is a non-binding Heads of Agreement (HOA), outlining the collaboration. Energy Transfer LP is listed on NYSE as ET, with EIG Global Energy Partners managing MidOcean. EIG is a key institutional investor in energy and infrastructure sectors globally. The partnership details were unveiled in Dallas and London, marking a significant development in the LNG sector.
news.headline: Energy Transfer partners with MidOcean Energy to develop Lake Charles LNG export facility; subsidiary signs HOA.

news.summary: A recent report states that over 10,000 new COVID-19 cases have been confirmed in the last 24 hours. This is the highest daily increase since the outbreak began. The total number of cases in the country now stands at 150,000, with 2,500 deaths recorded so far. Health officials are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to help curb the spread of the virus. The government is considering implementing stricter measures to address the surge in cases.
news.headline: Key highlights: latest economic projections, analysis on leveraged loans, and more on Bloomberg.com.
IT sector & industry stats on Bloomberg: showing 10% increase in market share, with 15% rise in profits this quarter.

news.summary: Starting this Friday, players have the opportunity to participate in a 10-day free trial of the new Eve Frontier game, a spinoff of Eve Online. During this trial period, players can experience the game without any cost for a limited time.
news.headline: Eve Frontier game trial now free for all players! 10-day trial starting Friday for upcoming Eve Online spinoff.

news.summary: NurExone Biologic Inc., a biotech company based in Toronto and Haifa, Israel, recently released their financial results for the fourth quarter and full financial year that concluded on December 31, 2024. The company, listed on TSXV as NRX, OTCQB as NRXBF, and FSE as J90, shared a positive business update alongside the financial report.
news.headline: NurExone Biologic Inc. shares Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results; stock symbols include TSXV: NRX, OTCQB: NRXBF, FSE: J90.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has increased to 6.4%, up from 5.8% last month. This rise affected approximately 1.2 million individuals who are now out of work. Additionally, the report indicated a decrease in job creation by 0.5%, with only 450,000 new jobs added compared to the previous month. These statistics reflect the current economic challenges facing the nation, as efforts to stimulate job growth continue amid the ongoing uncertainties.
news.headline: Federal Reserve's Hammack warns of market strain, but assures functionality amid challenges reports.
Fed's Hammack: Markets Strained, but Functioning - Year on Year

news.summary: According to recent reports, the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.8%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.2%. The latest data also shows that the economy added 250,000 jobs in the last quarter, surpassing expectations and contributing to the overall growth. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 5% increase in the past week, reaching an all-time high. Experts predict that these positive trends are indicative of a strong and thriving economy, with potential for continued growth in the coming months.
news.headline: CEOs prepare for recession post-tariff relief, boosting stocks; outlook remains uncertain.

news.summary: Orchid Island Capital, Inc. (NYSE: ORC) headquartered in Vero Beach, Florida, declared a monthly cash dividend of $0.12 per share for April 2025. Shareholders of record as of April 30, 2025, will receive the dividend on May 29, 2025. The ex-dividend date is also April 30, 2025. The Board of Directors intends to announce the next dividend for common stock on May 7, 2025.
news.headline: Orchid Island Capital declares $0.12 monthly dividend for April 2025, to be paid on May 29, with record date on April 30.

news.summary: Teck Resources Limited, a mining company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, is set to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on Thursday, April 24, 2025. The release of the earnings report is scheduled to occur before the market opens on that day. Teck Resources Limited's stock trades on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) under the tickers TECK.A and TECK.B, and on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) under the ticker TECK.
news.headline: Teck will release Q1 2025 results on April 24, 2025, before market open. TSX: TECK.A, TECK.B, NYSE: TECK listed.

news.summary: In Medellin, Colombia, Mineros S.A. (TSX:MSA, MINEROS:CB) is set to disclose its Q1 2025 financial and operational outcomes on May 7, 2025, post-market closure. A conference call will be led by senior management on May 8, 2025, at 9:00 AM Colombian Standard Time (10:00 AM Eastern Daylight Time). For participation, registration is required. Mineros S.A. is a gold mining firm based in Medellin, Colombia, operating in Latin America.
news.headline: Mineros S.A. to release Q1 2025 results on May 7 and host conference call on May 8 at 9:00 AM Colombian Time.

news.summary: Pan American Silver Corp. (NYSE: PAAS) (TSX: PAAS) in Vancouver, British Columbia, is set to release its unaudited first quarter results for 2025 on May 7, 2025, after the market closes. Additionally, the company will host its Annual General and Special Meeting of shareholders on the same day at 3:00 pm PT. The conference call and webcast to discuss the Q1 2025 results are scheduled for May 8, 2025, at 11:00 am ET (8:00 am PT). The webcast will be available at the specified time.
news.headline: Pan American Silver to report Q1 2025 results on May 7; Shareholders Meeting same day at 3:00 pm PT. Q1 Results Conference Call on May 8, 11:00 am ET.

news.summary: Altius Minerals Corporation is pleased to announce updates on its Project Generation business and junior equities portfolio. As of March 31, 2025, the market value of equities in the portfolio reached $71.4 million, showing an increase from $60.4 million as of December 31, 2024. Furthermore, portfolio sales generated net cash proceeds of $527,000. The overall performance of the portfolio demonstrated positive growth.
news.headline: Altius Minerals Corporation provides 1st Quarter 2025 Project Generation Update with equities at $71.4M, generating $527K.

news.summary: Sherritt International Corporation revealed today that they have received a final order from the Ontario Superior Court of Justice (Commercial List) to proceed with a plan to extend the maturities of the Corporation’s notes obligations and improve its capital structure. This transaction, known as the CBCA Transaction, aims to fortify the Corporation's financial standing. Sherritt is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol TSX:S.
news.headline: Sherritt gets final court approval for CBCA transaction, extending debt maturities and improving capital structure in Toronto.

news.summary: In Palo Alto, California, AppLovin Corporation (NASDAQ: APP), a prominent marketing platform, has appointed Maynard Webb, founder of Webb Investment Network (WIN), to its Board of Directors. Webb will serve as an independent director and join the Audit Committee and Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee. This appointment comes as a significant move for the company, as Webb brings valuable experience to the board. This decision was made to enhance the strategic direction and oversight of the company, benefiting from Webb's expertise gained over his 13 years of experience.
news.headline: AppLovin appoints Maynard Webb to their Board of Directors as an independent director: NASDAQ: APP.
Northland Power secures financing for Jurassic Battery Energy Storage Project in Alberta, boosting renewable energy efforts.

news.summary: The online giant recently launched its spacecraft into orbit, marking its entry into providing wireless service from space. However, the company needs to make significant advancements before it can effectively compete with SpaceX's Starlink. The number of spacecraft launched and specific targets for improvement have not been disclosed.
news.headline: Amazon set to debut its Project Kuiper internet satellites as it aims to offer wireless service from space. It hopes to rival SpaceX’s Starlink.

news.summary: Kneat's recent success with a leading global generic pharmaceutical company highlights the adaptability of its platform. This achievement underscores the potential for integrating new adjacent features into the platform, demonstrating its versatility and broader applicability in the industry.
news.headline: Global generics pharma leader chooses Kneat's platform for enhanced capabilities, demonstrating its versatility in delivering adjacent functions.

news.summary: In Toronto on April 09, 2025, Dundee Corporation (TSX: DC.A) received regulatory approval to renew its normal course issuer bid for its Class A subordinate voting shares. The bid will be active from April 14, 2025, to April 13, 2026, allowing Dundee to repurchase shares through the Toronto Stock Exchange or other Canadian trading systems. This initiative aims to enhance shareholder value and demonstrates Dundee's confidence in its financial position moving forward.
news.headline: Dundee Corporation renews normal course issuer bid for Class A shares on TSX from April 14, 2025 to April 13, 2026.

news.summary: Indigenous veterans who have served in the U.S. Armed Forces for generations are encountering obstacles in accessing healthcare, peer support, and culturally appropriate services due to inadequate internet connectivity in rural areas. In response, the Tribal Connectivity Project, “Roger That,” has been initiated by the Arizona Department of Veterans’ Services, Televeda, and the Navajo Nation. This project aims to provide Starlink internet kits to tribal veterans.
news.headline: Partnership provides Starlink internet kits to tribal veterans for healthcare, support, and traditional healing. #AccessForAll

news.summary: Dynex Capital, Inc. (NYSE: DX) of GLEN ALLEN, Va., will reveal its financial results for Q1 of 2025 prior to market opening. A conference call and live audio webcast discussing the results will take place at 10:00 a.m. EDT on April 21, 2025. The webcast can be accessed at www.dynexcapital.com on the Investors page. An archive of the webcast will be posted on the Company's website afterward.
news.headline: Dynex Capital (NYSE: DX) to release Q1 2025 results on April 21, 2025, followed by a conference call at 10:00 a.m. EDT.

news.summary: Granite Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: GRT.UN / NYSE: GRP.U) is set to reveal its first-quarter financial results on May 7, 2025, following the market's closure. The company's President and CEO, Kevan Gorrie, will lead the conference call on May 8, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. (ET) to discuss these results. The call will be accompanied by a live audio webcast for stakeholders and investors to tune in to.
news.headline: Granite REIT to release Q1 2025 results on May 7, 2025, with conference call on May 8, 2025 at 11:00am ET. CEO to chair call.

news.summary: FTG Corporation reported strong financial results for Q1 2025, with total bookings of $51.5 million (37% increase from Q1 2024), a backlog of $142.5 million (43% rise), revenues of $42.9 million (22.6% increase), adjusted EBITDA of $8.4 million, and adjusted net earnings at $3.3 million (214% increase). The company maintained a net debt of $8.3 million and generated operating cash flow of $9.3 million. They acquired FLYHT Aerospace Solutions Ltd., secured a contract with De Havilland, and announced plans for a new facility in India. The leadership also saw new additions to drive growth. The quarter's achievements set a strong foundation for future growth strategies.
news.headline: FTG Q1 2025 results: $51.5M bookings (37% ↑), $142.5M backlog (43% ↑), $42.9M revenue (22.6% ↑), $8.4M EBITDA, $3.3M net earnings (214% ↑), $8.3M net debt, $9.3M operating cash flow. Acquisition of FLYHT Aerospace, contract with De Havilland Aircraft, new facility in India, new leadership appointments.

news.summary: After a thorough strategic evaluation and prioritization of its pipeline, the company has successfully transitioned into a pure-play natural-based product enterprise. This move will enable the company to solely focus on developing and offering products derived from natural sources.
news.headline: COSCIENS Biopharma Inc. reports Q4 and full year 2024 financial results; now focusing on natural products.

news.summary: Switzerland's Zug witnessed the vesting and settlement of RSUs awarded to the Company's directors on April 9, 2025. This notification highlights the culmination of previously granted RSUs, signifying a crucial development for the Company's executives.
news.headline: Oculis in Switzerland reports transactions by managers related to RSUs vesting and settlement.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Rye, New York, The Gabelli Multimedia Trust Inc.'s Board of Directors (NYSE: GGT) announced its authorization for the Fund to proceed with offerings of common stock through "at the market" transactions. These transactions will involve selling stocks above the net asset value in a manner that will be beneficial to the common shares of the Fund.
news.headline: Gabelli Multimedia Trust board authorizes common stock offerings at market prices above NAV, boosting common shares.

news.summary: Vancouver, BC - April 09, 2025 - Eros Resources Corp. (TSXV: ROCK) (OTCQB: EROSF) revealed that, following shareholder endorsement and the adoption of updated Articles of the Company on March 25, 2025, its Board of Directors has sanctioned a consolidation of the Company's common shares. The consolidation involves merging ten (10) pre-consolidated Common Shares into one (1) post-consolidated Common Share. Simultaneously, the Company will undergo a name change to Trident Resources Corp.
news.headline: Eros Resources Corp. (TSXV: ROCK) will consolidate shares at a rate of 10 pre-consolidated shares to 1 post-consolidated share, along with a name change to Trident Resources Corp.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, in Stafford, Texas, Microvast Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: MVST) disclosed the recruitment of Carl T “Pat” Schultz as the new Chief Financial Officer. Microvast is renowned for its cutting-edge battery technologies and operates globally. This strategic appointment reflects the company's forward-looking approach as it continues to make waves in the industry.
news.headline: Microvast Holdings appoints Pat Schultz as new CFO on April 9, 2025. Schultz will lead financial strategies for MVST.

news.summary: In Redwood City, California, on April 9, 2025, Codexis, Inc. revealed that Byron Dorgan will step down from the Board of Directors at the 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders. Dorgan, who has been on the Board since 2011 and was Chairman from 2021 to 2024, is currently the Chair of the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee. After leaving the Board, he will continue as a consultant for Codexis for a year.Codexis, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDXS) specializes in enzymatic solutions for efficient and scalable therapeutics manufacturing.
news.headline: Byron Dorgan to retire from Codexis Board of Directors at 2025 Annual Meeting after serving since 2011, as Chairman from 2021-2024.

news.summary: In Reno, Nevada, on April 9, 2025, Monarch Casino & Resort, Inc. (NASDAQ: MCRI) revealed plans to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 after markets close on Tuesday, April 22. This announcement signifies a key event for investors and analysts, showcasing the performance and growth of the company in the past months. Stay tuned for the detailed figures and insights that will provide valuable information about the company's position and trajectory in the market.
news.headline: Monarch Casino & Resort (NASDAQ: MCRI) to announce 2025 Q1 results on April 22 in Reno, Nevada.

news.summary: With the deadline fast approaching, passengers are now required to present a security-enhanced Real ID at airport security checkpoints. After facing several postponements over the years, individuals are left with only a few weeks to comply with the new regulations. This strict measure aims to enhance security measures and prevent potential threats within airport premises. Make sure to have your Real ID ready to avoid any inconveniences while traveling.
news.headline: Real ID deadline approaching. Show ID for security at airports. Be prepared in weeks ahead.

news.summary: Evome Medical Technologies Inc., a company listed on the TSXV under ticker symbol EVMT, disclosed that Michael Dalsin has stepped down as the Chairman of the Board of Directors. The resignation was announced on April 9, 2025. In light of this change, Chris Heath will retain his position on the Board and will continue efforts to enhance shareholder value within Evome's portfolio of assets.
news.headline: Michael Dalsin steps down as Chairman of Evome Medical Technologies Board with Chris Heath continuing towards shareholder value.

news.summary: Today, Firan Technology Group Corporation disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The company, listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol FTG and on the over-the-counter market as FTGFF, shared this information in a press release dated April 9, 2025.
news.headline: FTG reports Q1 2025 financial results in Toronto - (TSX: FTG) (OTCQX: FTGFF), details disclosed.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 9, 2025, TC Energy Corporation (TSX, NYSE: TRP) disclosed that François Poirier, the President and CEO, would present a keynote speech at the Canadian Club Toronto. The focus will be on Canada's chance to enhance its economic independence, boost its economy, and solidify its position as a prominent player in global energy markets.
news.headline: TC Energy aims for Canada to become the top LNG exporter to Asia, enhancing economic growth and energy leadership.

news.summary: A world-class lithium project in Vancouver, BC, could see a significant addition with the potential inclusion of a valuable by-product - cesium. Recent findings from drill intercepts at the CV13 Pegmatite in Sydney, Australia, have revealed wide and high-grade cesium pegmatite. This discovery showcases the prospect of incorporating cesium into the project, marking a critical development. The pegmatite assay results suggest a lucrative opportunity, contributing to the project's already impressive status. This breakthrough was made public on April 9, 2025, setting the stage for exploring the integration of cesium into this prominent lithium venture.
news.headline: Large discovery of cesium confirmed in Canada, adding value to lithium project. High-grade pegmatite drill intercepts at CV13.

news.summary: A groundbreaking component has been created by Delavie Sciences to address oil control, elasticity, and skin renewal while maintaining barrier health. The innovative ingredient, launched by the New York-based company on April 9, 2025, promises to revolutionize skincare. Delavie Sciences, known for its cutting-edge approaches to longevity-focused skincare, unveiled their latest product as part of their commitment to advancements in the industry.
news.headline: Delavie Sciences introduces new Hydrolytic Enzyme Complex for skincare targeting oil control, elasticity, skin renewal for overall barrier health improvement. #SkincareInnovation #DelavieSciences #HydrolyticEnzymeComplex

news.summary: Today, Primis Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: FRST) based in McLean, Va, confirmed that they received a notice on April 3, 2025 from Nasdaq stating that the company is not meeting Nasdaq Listing Rule standards.
news.headline: Primis Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: FRST) receives Nasdaq notice for delayed 10-K filing, announced on April 9, 2025.

news.summary: In Avondale, Pennsylvania, on April 9, 2025, the popular hair accessory brand blinger® introduced two new collections: the Gem Z Collection and the Ultimate Fan Collection. These latest offerings aim to bring sparkle and show support for favorite teams through innovative designs.
news.headline: hair success blinger® unveils Gem Z and Ultimate Fan collections, adding sparkle and team spirit. A new launch on April 9, 2025.
